text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf has entered the final stage of
preparation for the Satsuki Sho, the first race of
the Classic Triple Crown. Her focus is astonishing
to behold...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That means she's controlling her pace perfectly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She previously requested that we up the training
difficulty to be higher than what it was before her
racing debut, and now we're seeing the results.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: What did you think, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she runs like this on the day of the race, the
Satsuki Sho's as good as ours. I open my mouth to
say as much, when...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hey, Prez.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Why, if it isn't Brian. I take it you aren't here to
train?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: No. There's a problem. You've gotta come quick.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It looks like I'm going to have to step away for a
while. Is that all right with you, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: That won't be nece—

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
No, you're right. My problems are your problems
now.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: This way, then. And thank you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We hurry to the student council office. As we
arrive, we hear voices coming through the door.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...you certain? I understand... But, perhaps...

text_block_list.name: Student Council General Manager
text_block_list.text: But... can't... that's why...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I'm coming in.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She opens the door...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: President?! Why are you—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Brian. I should have known. Why did you get
the President involved?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: We're getting nowhere without her.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: She has training to focus on. You can't just—

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Coming here was my decision. Could you please
tell me what's happened?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: We can resolve this oursel—

text_block_list.name: Student Council General Manager
text_block_list.text: I'm so sorry! It's all my fault!

text_block_list.name: Student Council General Manager
text_block_list.text:
I can't do this anymore! I'm quitting the student
council!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And with those words, she flees the room.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Wait!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Not so fast, Air Groove. I want to speak with you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: You go, Brian.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Now, if I may ask... Is this related to the problem
that you promised to explain in due time?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: It is. I apologize for failing to resolve it.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
There's no need for that. But I would like you to
tell me what's going on.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The general manager approached me a while ago,
saying that she wanted to resign from the student
council.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: For what reason?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
She felt unequal to the task. I suspect that she
was troubled by how frequently she's been
lagging behind in her duties.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
She said that she respected you too much to drag
you down.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I see... I think I understand.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
She is still inexperienced, but she's shown she has
room to grow. I've been telling her it's too soon
to give up, and it's worked until now, but...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, I can tell you put a great deal of
effort into this. I only regret that I left you to do
it alone.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Not at all! I—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just then, the door opens again.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: We're back.

text_block_list.name: Student Council General Manager
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...
choice_data_list: (Looks like Brian really had to chase her down.)

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Good work, Brian.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Now, as for you...

text_block_list.name: Student Council General Manager
text_block_list.text: I-I'm sorry I ran...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Fear not, I take no offense. I simply want to ask
you to do something for me.

text_block_list.name: Student Council General Manager
text_block_list.text: Wh-what is it?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I intend to attempt the Classic Triple Crown in
the coming months. Will you come and watch the
first race?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
All I want is for you to see me run in person, like
you did before. Will you do that for me?

text_block_list.name: Student Council General Manager
text_block_list.text: Um... I'd be happy to, but...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Excellent. That will be all. You may go home for
the day.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Don't worry, Air Groove. I'll take care of this.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Now, I believe I left my training session
unfinished. Shall we get back to work, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not quite sure where this is going, but it seems
like Symboli Rudolf has a plan. We resume our
training session with me still at a loss.
